title: Chip Specifications Schema
description: JSON Schema for all spec files in this repository. Covers _index.yaml, specs/nvidia/gpus/*.yaml, specs/amd/gpus/*.yaml, specs/amd/cpus/*.yaml, and specs/intel/cpus/*.yaml.

index_entry.description: One row in specs/_index.yaml — key metrics + spec_file pointer.

type.description: e.g. datacenter GPU, consumer GPU, superchip, datacenter rack (72 GPUs)

memory_bw_tbs.description: Memory bandwidth in TB/s (use for >= 1 TB/s)

memory_bw_gbs.description: Memory bandwidth in GB/s (use for < 1 TB/s)

spec_file.description: Relative path from repo root to the full spec YAML, e.g. specs/nvidia/gpus/blackwell.yaml

cpu_entry.description: One CPU entry in specs/amd/cpus/*.yaml or specs/intel/cpus/*.yaml.

full_name.description: Full marketing name, e.g. AMD EPYC 7763

product_collection.description: Product line name, e.g. EPYC 9005 Series, 5th Gen Intel Xeon Scalable

code_name.description: Microarchitecture platform code name, e.g. Milan, Genoa, Sapphire Rapids

launch_date.description: Product launch date or quarter, e.g. Q2'21, 11/10/2022

total_threads.description: Logical thread count per socket (with SMT/HT enabled)

max_turbo_frequency_ghz.description: Single-core max boost frequency in GHz

all_core_turbo_frequency_ghz.description: All-core sustained boost frequency in GHz

cache_mb.description: Last-level cache size in MB (L3 for AMD, LLC for Intel)

upi_speed_gts.description: Intel UPI inter-socket link speed in GT/s

max_upi_links.description: Number of Intel UPI links for multi-socket configuration

tdp_w.description: Default Thermal Design Power in watts

ctdp_range.description: Configurable TDP range, e.g. 225-280W (AMD cTDP) or Intel TDP-up/down

max_memory_size_tb.description: Maximum addressable memory per socket in TB

memory_types.description: Supported DIMM types and speeds, e.g. DDR5-4800, DDR5-6400 / MRDIMM-8800

max_memory_speed_mhz.description: Maximum memory speed in MHz (Intel convention)

max_memory_speed_mts.description: Maximum memory speed in MT/s (AMD convention)

memory_channels.description: Number of independent memory channels per socket

memory_bandwidth_gbs.description: Peak theoretical memory bandwidth in GB/s (channels × per-channel BW)

max_pcie_lanes.description: Total PCIe lanes available per socket

socket.description: CPU socket type, e.g. SP3, SP5, FCLGA4677, FCLGA7529

package_carrier.description: Intel package carrier designation, e.g. E1A, BR1A

dts_max_c.description: Maximum die temperature (Digital Thermal Sensor) in °C

package_size_mm.description: Physical package dimensions in mm, e.g. 77.5 x 56.5

instruction_set_extensions.description: Supported ISA extensions, e.g. SSE4.2, AVX2, AVX-512, AMX

avx512_fma_units.description: AVX-512 FMA units per core (1 = 256-bit fused pair, 2 = native 512-bit)

simd_width_bits.description: Width of the widest SIMD register in bits

avx_fp_units.description: Total FP32 execution lanes across all cores (derived)

peak_fp32_tflops.description: Peak single-socket FP32 throughput in TFLOPS (derived)

peak_fp32_clock_ghz.description: Clock speed used for peak FP32 calculation in GHz

amx.description: Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (tile-based matrix acceleration) support

dl_boost.description: Intel DL Boost (VNNI instructions for INT8 inference) support

speed_select_core_power.description: Intel Speed Select Technology — Core Power (per-core TDP tuning)

speed_select_turbo_freq.description: Intel Speed Select Technology — Turbo Frequency (tiered boost bins)

speed_select_base_freq.description: Intel Speed Select Technology — Base Frequency profile switching

speed_select_performance_profile.description: Intel Speed Select Technology — Performance Profile support

high_priority_cores.description: Number of high-priority cores in a Speed Select / core tiering config

high_priority_core_freq_ghz.description: Base frequency for high-priority cores in GHz

low_priority_cores.description: Number of low-priority cores in a Speed Select / core tiering config

low_priority_core_freq_ghz.description: Base frequency for low-priority cores in GHz

speed_shift.description: Intel Speed Shift Technology (hardware-controlled P-state transitions)

volume_management_device_vmd.description: Intel Volume Management Device (hot-plug NVMe management)

on_demand_activation.description: Intel On Demand feature activation (software-licensed capabilities)

qat_devices.description: Number of on-die Intel QuickAssist Technology (QAT) accelerator devices

dlb_devices.description: Number of on-die Intel Dynamic Load Balancer (DLB) devices

dsa_devices.description: Number of on-die Intel Data Streaming Accelerator (DSA) devices

iaa_devices.description: Number of on-die Intel In-Memory Analytics Accelerator (IAA) devices

supported_technologies.description: Vendor-listed platform technologies, e.g. AMD Infinity Guard, Infinity Architecture

sgx.description: Intel Software Guard Extensions support and variant, e.g. Yes with Intel SPS

sgx_epc_max_gb.description: Maximum SGX Enclave Page Cache size in GB

trusted_execution_technology.description: Intel TXT (measured launch environment for platform integrity)

execute_disable_bit.description: XD/NX bit support (hardware data execution prevention)

total_memory_encryption.description: Intel TME — encrypts all DRAM at the memory controller

total_memory_encryption_multi_key.description: Intel TME-MK — multiple independent encryption keys for memory isolation

tdx.description: Intel Trust Domain Extensions (hardware-isolated confidential VMs)

platform_firmware_resilience.description: Intel PFR — firmware protection, detection, and recovery

control_flow_enforcement.description: Intel CET — shadow stack and indirect branch tracking against ROP/JOP

os_guard.description: Intel OS Guard (SMEP/SMAP — prevents supervisor-mode execution of user pages)

boot_guard.description: Intel Boot Guard (authenticated code module for secure boot)

run_sure.description: Intel Run Sure Technology (enhanced RAS and error handling)

mbec.description: Mode-Based Execute Control (per-mode execute protections for hypervisors)

quickassist_sw_acceleration.description: Intel QuickAssist software acceleration fallback when no QAT hardware is present

fips_certification.description: FIPS 140 certification status, e.g. Certified, In Review

microarch.description: AMD only — e.g. Zen 3, Zen 4, Zen 5

generation.description: e.g. Milan, Genoa, Turin, Sapphire Rapids

memory_bandwidth_gbs.description: Peak single-socket memory bandwidth in GB/s

avx_fp_units.description: Number of FP32 lanes across all AVX units

peak_fp32_clock_ghz.description: Clock speed at which peak FP32 is measured

nvidia_gpu_entry.description: Full NVIDIA GPU spec entry (one chip inside gpus: in a specs/nvidia/gpus/*.yaml file).

name.description: Short identifier, e.g. H100 SXM5, GB200, A100-SXM4-80GB

release_date.description: Product launch date or quarter, e.g. Q4'22

architecture.description: GPU microarchitecture name, e.g. Hopper, Blackwell, Ampere

gpu_count.description: Number of GPU dies in the system or module (1 for single-chip cards)

cpu.description: Paired host CPU for superchip/integrated products, e.g. Grace

streaming_multiprocessors.description: Total number of SMs per GPU

cuda_cores_fp32_per_sm.description: FP32 CUDA cores per SM (128 for Hopper/Blackwell)

cuda_cores_fp32_per_gpu.description: Total FP32 CUDA cores per GPU (SMs × cores/SM)

max_clock_speed.description: Maximum GPU boost clock in MHz

form_factor.description: Physical form factor, e.g. SXM5, PCIe, OAM, NVL72 rack

sm_execution_model.description: Per-SM resource limits defining occupancy and parallelism.

shared_memory_per_sm.description: Maximum configurable shared memory per SM, e.g. 228 KB

shared_memory_per_block.description: Maximum shared memory per thread block, e.g. 227 KB

max_resident_threads_per_sm.description: Maximum concurrent threads per SM (determines theoretical occupancy)

max_resident_blocks_per_sm.description: Maximum concurrent thread blocks per SM

architecture.description: Memory subsystem architecture, e.g. HBM3, HBM3E, LPDDR5x

total_capacity.description: Total memory across all GPU dies, e.g. 80 GB

pageable_memory_access_via_host_page_tab.description: GPU can access CPU pageable memory directly via ATS/SVM

concurrent_managed_access.description: GPU and CPU can concurrently access Unified Memory regions

gpu_memory.description: On-package HBM/GDDR memory attached directly to the GPU die.

l2_cache.description: L2 / last-level GPU cache size, e.g. 50 MB

bus_width.description: Memory bus width in bits, e.g. 5120-bit

cpu_memory.description: Host LPDDR5x / DRAM specs for superchips with integrated CPU (e.g. Grace Hopper, Grace Blackwell).

compute_performance.description: Peak throughput figures in TFLOPS (or TOPS for integer). Sparse = 2× dense via sparsity acceleration.

tf32.description: TF32 Tensor Core TFLOPS (10-bit mantissa, 8-bit exponent)

fp8.description: FP8 Tensor Core TFLOPS (dense), or false if unsupported

fp6.description: FP6 Tensor Core TFLOPS (dense), or false if unsupported

fp4.description: FP4 Tensor Core TFLOPS (dense), or false if unsupported

tensor_core_generation.description: Tensor Core generation label, e.g. 4th Gen, 5th Gen

fp4_fp6_tensor_core_support.description: Whether FP4/FP6 Tensor Cores are present (Blackwell+)

fp8_support.description: Whether FP8 Tensor Cores are present (Hopper+)

gpu_tdp.description: GPU-only TDP (excluding host CPU) in watts, used for superchips

total_system_tdp.description: Full system TDP including CPU and switching, e.g. GB200 NVL2 total

total_rack_tdp.description: Total rack-level TDP in kilowatts, e.g. NVL72

idle_power.description: Power draw at idle in watts

form_factor.description: Physical packaging, e.g. SXM5, PCIe Gen5 x16, OAM

advanced_features.description: NVLink, NVSwitch, confidential computing, MIG, and other optional capabilities.

networking_and_connectivity.description: Network interface specs (InfiniBand, Ethernet) for DGX/HGX nodes.

software_and_ecosystem.description: Minimum software stack versions required or recommended for this GPU.

nccl.description: Recommended NCCL version for multi-GPU collective communications

amd_gpu_entry.description: Full AMD GPU spec entry (one chip inside gpus: in a specs/amd/gpus/*.yaml file).

name.description: Short identifier, e.g. MI300X, MI325X, RX 9070 XT

release_date.description: Product launch date or quarter, e.g. Q1'24

architecture.description: GPU compute architecture, e.g. CDNA 3, CDNA 4, RDNA 4

target_id.description: ROCm target GFX ID, e.g. gfx942, gfx950

gpu_count.description: Number of GPU dies in the package (1 for single-die, 3 for MI300X)

host_cpu.description: Paired host CPU die for APUs/integrated products, e.g. Zen 4 (MI300A)

compute_units.description: Total Compute Units across all GPU dies

stream_processors_per_cu.description: Stream processors (shaders) per CU — fixed at 64 for all CDNA/RDNA

wavefront_size.description: Wavefront width in work-items — fixed at 64 for all AMD GPU architectures

max_clock_speed.description: Maximum engine (shader) clock in MHz or GHz

form_factor.description: Physical packaging, e.g. OAM, PCIe Gen5 x16

process_node.description: Manufacturing process node, e.g. TSMC N5, TSMC N6

cu_execution_model.description: Per-CU resource limits defining occupancy and parallelism (AMD equivalent of NVIDIA SM execution model).

lds_per_cu.description: Local Data Share (LDS) per CU — AMD equivalent of NVIDIA shared memory, e.g. 64 KB

max_wavefronts_per_cu.description: Maximum concurrent wavefronts per CU (AMD equivalent of NVIDIA warps per SM)

max_workitems_per_cu.description: Maximum concurrent work-items per CU (wavefronts × 64) — fixed at 2048

simd_units_per_cu.description: SIMD32 execution units per CU — fixed at 4 for CDNA/RDNA

vgpr_per_cu.description: Vector General Purpose Register file size per CU, e.g. 512 × 32 × 4 = 65536 VGPRs

sgpr_per_cu.description: Scalar General Purpose Register file size per CU

architecture.description: Memory subsystem architecture, e.g. HBM3, HBM3E

total_capacity.description: Total HBM capacity across all stacks, e.g. 192 GB

addressing_mode.description: Virtual address space mode, e.g. 64-bit flat

gpu_memory.description: On-package HBM stacks attached to the GPU die(s).

infinity_cache.description: AMD Infinity Cache size — last-level GPU cache acting as HBM bandwidth amplifier

bandwidth.description: Peak aggregate HBM bandwidth, e.g. 5.3 TB/s

bus_width.description: Total HBM bus width in bits across all stacks, e.g. 8192-bit

compute_performance.description: Peak throughput in TFLOPS. MFMA = Matrix Fused Multiply-Add (AMD equivalent of NVIDIA Tensor Cores). Dense = no sparsity, Sparse = 2× via structured sparsity.

fp16_bf16_mfma_sparse.description: FP16 / BF16 MFMA sparse TFLOPS (2× dense via structured sparsity)

matrix_core_generation.description: MFMA generation label, e.g. 4th Gen CDNA Matrix Cores — AMD equivalent of NVIDIA Tensor Core generation

socket_tdp.description: Total socket TDP for multi-die packages in watts, e.g. 750W

cooling.description: Cooling method, e.g. Passive (liquid-cooled by system), Active

advanced_features.description: Infinity Fabric, XGMI links, confidential compute, and other platform capabilities.

networking_and_connectivity.description: Network and interconnect specs for MI300 nodes (InfiniBand, Ethernet).

software_and_ecosystem.description: Minimum software stack versions required or recommended for this GPU.

rocm_version.description: Minimum ROCm version (AMD equivalent of CUDA Toolkit), e.g. 6.0

programming_model.description: GPU programming model — HIP C++ is AMD's CUDA-compatible API

math_libraries.description: Recommended math libraries, e.g. rocBLAS, hipBLAS

dnn_library.description: DNN library — MIOpen is AMD's equivalent of cuDNN

inference_runtime.description: Recommended inference runtime, e.g. MIGraphX, ONNX Runtime

collective_comms.description: Collective communications library — RCCL is AMD's equivalent of NCCL

cpus.description: CPU summary entries — key fields + spec_file pointer.
